channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SOFTTECH] Softtech: Elimath Advisors Sells 16.23% Stake on May 7, 2026
item.description:
Elimath Advisors Pvt Ltd, owned by Mathew Cyriac, sold 22,46,998 equity shares of Softtech Engineers Limited, representing 16.23% of the company's total share capital, on May 7, 2026, through a market transaction. Following the sale, Elimath Advisors holds zero shares in Softtech Engineers. The transaction value is ₹13,84,21,380. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Elimath Advisors sold 22,46,998 shares of Softtech Engineers on May 7, 2026.
  • The sale represents 16.23% of Softtech Engineers' total share capital.
  • The transaction was executed through the open market.
  • Post-sale, Elimath Advisors holds no shares in Softtech Engineers.
  • The total value of shares sold is ₹13,84,21,380.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Softtech Engineers Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [SSL] Share Samadhan Board Meeting on May 14, 2026
item.description:
Share Samadhan Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the half-yearly and financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with the auditor's report. The board will also consider the appointment of the Secretarial Auditor for the financial year 2025-26 and any other business with the chair's permission. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 14, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Audited standalone and consolidated results for FY26 to be considered.
  • Appointment of Secretarial Auditor for FY25-26 on the agenda.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours post-results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Share Samadhan Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SATIN] Satin Creditcare FY26 PAT Up 78.5% YoY to ₹332 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Satin Creditcare Network Ltd announced its audited financial results for FY26, reporting a consolidated Profit After Tax (PAT) of ₹332 Crores, a 78.5% increase YoY. The company's Assets Under Management (AUM) stood at ₹15,174 Crores, up 18.7% YoY. The lender's Q4 FY26 PAT surged by 640.5% YoY to ₹162 Crores. The company's PAR 1 improved to 3.7% in Q4 FY26 on a standalone basis. The company achieved an S&P Corporate Sustainability Assessment (CSA) score of 59/100.

  • Consolidated PAT for FY26 increased by 78.5% YoY to ₹332 Crores.
  • Assets Under Management (AUM) reached ₹15,174 Crores, up 18.7% YoY.
  • Standalone PAR 1 improved to 3.7% in Q4 FY26.
  • Total fund mobilization of ₹11,994 Crores during FY26 on a consolidated basis.
  • The company's capital adequacy ratio stood at 25.4% as of March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Satin Creditcare Network Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SABTN] Aqylon Nexus: Kurjibhai Rupareliya Sells 2% Stake
item.description:
Kurjibhai Rupareliya sold shares of Aqylon Nexus Limited, resulting in a decrease in his holding from 53.92% to 51.92%. The transaction was executed through open market. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Kurjibhai Rupareliya disposed of 50,88,883 shares of Aqylon Nexus.
  • His shareholding decreased from 53.92% to 51.92% after the sale.
  • The sale was executed through the open market.
  • The disclosure is under SEBI's Substantial Acquisition of Shares regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SRI ADHIKARI BROTHERS TELEVISION NETWORK LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [PRATIKSH] Pratiksha Chemicals Board Meeting Scheduled for May 14, 2026
item.description:
Pratiksha Chemicals Ltd has announced that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled for May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the unaudited financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the results are submitted.

  • Board meeting on May 14, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Unaudited financial results for quarter ended March 31, 2026, to be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026.
  • Trading window reopens 48 hours after results submission.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRATIKSHA CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PHCAP] PH Capital: Open Offer for 26% Shares at ₹206.66
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Choice Capital Advisors, the manager to the offer, has submitted a Letter of Offer to BSE for the public shareholders of PH Capital Ltd. Mr. Aditya Himmat Bhansali is making an open offer to acquire up to 780,026 fully paid-up equity shares of PH Capital, representing 26.00% of the paid-up equity share capital, at a price of ₹206.66 per share. This offer complies with SEBI's Takeover Regulations.

  • Open offer for 26% of PH Capital's equity shares.
  • Offer price is ₹206.66 per equity share in cash.
  • Acquirer is Mr. Aditya Himmat Bhansali.
  • Offer not conditional on minimum acceptance level.
  • No statutory approvals are required as of the LOF date.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PH CAPITAL LTD. | Category: Open Offer

item.title: [MARUTI] Maruti Suzuki: CCI Hearing Adjourned to May 25, 2026
item.description:
Maruti Suzuki India Ltd. has announced that the Competition Commission of India (CCI) hearing, previously scheduled for May 11, 2026, has been adjourned. The adjournment was requested on behalf of the CCI. The matter is now scheduled for arguments on behalf of the CCI on May 25, 2026.

  • CCI hearing regarding Maruti Suzuki adjourned to May 25, 2026.
  • Adjournment sought by the Competition Commission of India.
  • The hearing is for arguments on behalf of the CCI.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MARUTI SUZUKI INDIA LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [BLACKBUCK] Black Buck Ltd: Monitoring Agency Report for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Black Buck Ltd (formerly Zinka Logistics Solutions Limited) submits the Monitoring Agency Report by ICRA Limited for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. The report confirms that the utilization of IPO proceeds is in line with the objects of the issue. ICRA states the report is based on information provided by the Issuer and does not constitute a commentary on the quality of the objects of the issue.

  • ICRA Limited is the Monitoring Agency for Black Buck's IPO.
  • No deviation from the objects of the issue was observed.
  • The report provides an objective view based on information provided by the Issuer.
  • ICRA confirms no conflict of interest in monitoring the utilization of issue proceeds.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zinka Logistics Solutions Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [PREMCO] Premco Global Approves FY26 Results, Recommends ₹2 Dividend
item.description:
Premco Global Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board recommended a final dividend of ₹2 per equity share, subject to shareholder approval. The appointment of CS Jay Narendra Sonavane as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer was also approved. The re-appointment of the Internal Auditor was deferred.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 (standalone & consolidated) approved.
  • Final dividend of ₹2 per share recommended, pending shareholder approval.
  • CS Jay Narendra Sonavane appointed as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer.
  • Re-appointment of Internal Auditor deferred to the next board meeting.
  • Statutory Auditors issued an unqualified and unmodified audit opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PREMCO GLOBAL LTD.-$ | Category: Dividend

item.title: [SOFTTECH] Fedex Finance Acquires 16.23% Stake in Softtech Engineers
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fedex Finance Private Limited acquired 22,46,998 equity shares of Softtech Engineers Limited on May 7, 2026, through market purchase, representing 16.23% of the total share/voting capital. This acquisition brings Fedex Finance's total holding in Softtech Engineers to 22,46,998 shares, maintaining the same percentage of the total capital. The acquisition was made via open market purchase.

  • Fedex Finance acquired 22,46,998 shares of Softtech Engineers on May 7, 2026.
  • The acquisition represents 16.23% of Softtech Engineers' total share/voting capital.
  • The shares were acquired through an open market purchase.
  • Post-acquisition, Fedex Finance holds a total of 22,46,998 shares in Softtech Engineers.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Softtech Engineers Ltd | Category: Shareholding
